---
title: "Unassigned PI"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("data/unassigned-pi.json"), Path("../data/unassigned-pi.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/unassigned-pi.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report unassigned-pi"
    )

d       = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group   = d["group"]
by_type = d["by_type"]
total   = d["total"]

ICONS = {"Epic": "🏆", "Capability": "🧩", "Feature": "🛠️", "Unknown": "❓"}
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>Items listed here have no <code>PIID::</code> label and are not committed to any
Program Increment. <strong>Total unassigned: {total}</strong></p>
""")
```

```{python}
if total == 0:
    display(HTML("<p>✅ All epics are assigned to a PI.</p>"))
else:
    html = ""
    for etype in ("Epic", "Capability", "Feature", "Unknown"):
        rows = by_type.get(etype, [])
        if not rows:
            continue
        icon  = ICONS[etype]
        html += f"<h2>{icon} {etype} ({len(rows)})</h2>"
        html += """
<table class="table table-sm table-striped">
  <thead><tr><th>Title</th><th>State</th><th>Parent</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
"""
        for row in rows:
            link   = f'<a href="{row["url"]}" target="_blank">{row["title"]}</a>' if row["url"] else row["title"]
            parent = f'<em>{row["parent"]}</em>' if row["parent"] else "—"
            html  += f"<tr><td>{link}</td><td>{row['state']}</td><td>{parent}</td></tr>"
        html += "  </tbody>\n</table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

| Icon | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| 🏆 | Epic | Portfolio-level initiative spanning multiple PIs and ARTs |
| 🧩 | Capability | Large Solution deliverable sized to fit within a PI |
| 🛠️ | Feature | Service or function delivered by a single ART within one PI |

**Parent** — direct parent epic in the hierarchy, if one exists. Items with no parent and no
children are also captured by the Orphaned Epics report.
:::
